title: lithocarpus ducampii
intro: Lithocarpus ducampii, also known as the Red Bay Laurel, is a species of evergreen tree native to tropical Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Lithocarpus ducampii include reducing fever, relieving cough and cold symptoms, and treating respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the leaves and bark of the tree are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
